description: Fix 16+14 bugs found during /simplify cross-review. Original 16: 7 P0 runtime crashes, 3 P1 security, 4 P2 logic, 2 P2 smells. Full app review found 14 more: 4 CRITICAL API routes writing deprecated status, 7 HIGH deprecated references in services/utils, 3 MEDIUM UI/mapper cleanups.

userStories.title: Fix 7 API routes referencing deleted intervention_contacts table
userStories.description: As a prestataire, I want work-completion, quotes, slot selection, and availability APIs to work without runtime crashes caused by referencing the renamed intervention_contacts table.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 API routes reference intervention_assignments instead of intervention_contacts
userStories.notes: P0 — Fixed 7 files: work-completion, create-provider-account, quotes, select-slot, availabilities, user-availability, quotes/cancel | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Fix PostgREST search injection in lot and building repositories
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want all .or()/.ilike() search queries to sanitize user input to prevent PostgREST filter injection.
acceptanceCriteria: building.repository.ts:322 uses sanitizeSearch(query) in primary .or() path
userStories.notes: P1 — Added sanitizeSearch import to lot.repository.ts, wrapped both search paths | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Fix validateEnum missing proprietaire role
userStories.description: As a developer, I want role validation to accept all 5 valid roles including proprietaire.
acceptanceCriteria: user.repository.ts validate() includes proprietaire in role enum (line 46)
userStories.notes: P1 — Added proprietaire to all 3 validateEnum calls via replace_all | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Remove deprecated statuses demande_de_devis and en_cours
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the codebase to reflect the current 9-status intervention model without deprecated statuses.
acceptanceCriteria: intervention.repository.ts validate() removes demande_de_devis and en_cours from enum
intervention.repository.ts getInterventionStats() removes demande_de_devis and en_cours from byStatus
intervention-schedule/route.ts:109 removes demande_de_devis from allowed statuses
userStories.notes: P2 — Cleaned 3 locations across 2 files | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Fix .single() without role filter on intervention_assignments
userStories.description: As a prestataire assigned to multiple interventions, I want queries to correctly filter by role to avoid PGRST116 crashes.
userStories.notes: P2 — prestataire page uses .eq('role') since role is known; confirm-participation uses .limit(1).maybeSingle() since role is unknown | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Remove dead code and identity copy in mime-types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want clean code without dead functions and useless identity copies.
acceptanceCriteria: getPriorityColor removed from intervention-display.ts (dead — all consumers use lib/intervention-utils.ts)
ALLOWED_CHAT_MIME_TYPES removed from mime-types.ts (identity copy of ALLOWED_DOCUMENT_MIME_TYPES_EXTENDED)
userStories.notes: P2 — Removed dead getPriorityColor (English inputs, unused), removed ALLOWED_CHAT_MIME_TYPES identity copy, updated use-chat-upload.ts import | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Fix CRITICAL API routes writing demande_de_devis to DB
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want API routes to use requires_quote flag instead of the deprecated demande_de_devis status.
acceptanceCriteria: generate-intervention-magic-links sets requires_quote:true instead of status:demande_de_devis
approve/reject quote routes check status=approuvee not demande_de_devis
intervention-cancel route removes demande_de_devis from cancellable list
userStories.notes: CRITICAL — magic-links was WRITING deprecated status to DB. Fixed to set requires_quote:true. Quote approve/reject now transition from approuvee. | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Clean demande_de_devis from service/utility files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all service and utility files to use the current 9-status enum.
acceptanceCriteria: stats.service.ts: no demande_de_devis in requiresAction filter
userStories.notes: Cleaned deprecated status from 4 service/utility files | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Add sanitizeSearch to remaining repositories
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all .ilike() calls with user input wrapped in sanitizeSearch().
acceptanceCriteria: address.repository.ts uses sanitizeSearch in findByTeam city filter
userStories.notes: P1 Security — Added sanitizeSearch to 3 more repositories | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Clean demande_de_devis from all UI components and hooks
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all UI components and hooks to use the current 9-status enum and requires_quote flag.
acceptanceCriteria: big-calendar-wrapper.tsx: no demande_de_devis in color maps
integrated-quotes-card.tsx: uses requires_quote instead of status check
interventions-navigator.tsx: no demande_de_devis in filter arrays
intervention-cancel-button.tsx: no demande_de_devis in cancellable list
programming-modal-FINAL.tsx: uses requires_quote instead of status check
intervention-modal-header.tsx: uses requires_quote instead of status check
use-tenant-data.ts: no demande_de_devis in status filter
use-prestataire-data.ts: no demande_de_devis in 3 status filters
userStories.notes: Cleaned 11 UI files. Status checks replaced with requires_quote flag. Removed unused FileText imports. | Implemented 2026-03-13

userStories.title: Clean demande_de_devis from mappers and API route
userStories.description: As a developer, I want intervention-mappers.ts and remaining API routes to use the current 9-status enum.
acceptanceCriteria: intervention-mappers.ts: no demande_de_devis in STATUS_TO_FRONTEND, STATUS_TO_LABEL, statusRequiresManagerAction
quotes/[quoteId]/route.ts: filters by approuvee not demande_de_devis
intervention-quote-validate/route.ts: oldStatus is approuvee not demande_de_devis
userStories.notes: Fixed mapper configs, API route DB filter, notification oldStatus, and test assertion. All 36 mapper tests pass. | Implemented 2026-03-13
